description: Minimum values for tunable parameters. Agents can raise these but NEVER lower them below the floor. This prevents optimization from eroding safety margins.

test_pass_rate.description: Test suite must maintain at least 95% pass rate. Iteration halts if it drops below.

type_check_clean.description: TypeScript compilation must remain error-free. No iteration may introduce type errors.

max_iteration_cycles.description: Iteration loops must have a finite cycle limit (even if large).

circuit_breaker_consecutive_failures.description: Halt after N consecutive iterations with no improvement.

time_budget_per_cycle_seconds.description: Each iteration cycle has a wall-clock budget.

custom_floors.description: Project-specific safety floors. Users add constraints here.
